titleStmt.title: SII 26.560: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 560. (A.R. No. 530 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the gōpura in the same temple.

p.hi: Perumāḷ Kulaśēkharadēva: Ś. 1387, Year 2+34, Makara (Tai) 29, ba. 10, Saturday, Rōhinī = 1466, A.D., January 25; f.d.n. ·12, if the tithi was śu 10.

summary.p: This inscription is incomplete at the end.

It refers to the construction of the various parts of the temple of the god Viśvanātha and the provision made for worship and offerings therein in olden days by Poṉṉiṉ-Perumāḷ Parākkiramapāṇḍyadēva. It also refers to the arrangement made for continuing these services and worship in the temple with the help of a certain group of people and five classes of servants. It records a decision by various groups of people and the five classes of servants to institute a festival in their name in the temple and to provide for the various items of articles required in that connection.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śivamastu § śakābda
m Āyirattu muṉṉū
ṟṟu Eṇpattu Eḻi
ṉ meṟ cellā ni
ṉṟa perumāḷ ku
la cekara tevark
ku yāṇṭu Iraṇ
ṭāvatiṉ Etir mu
ppattu nālāvatu
makara ñāyaṟṟu Iru
pattu Oṉpatānti
yatiyum pūrvvapakṣa
ttu daśamiyum caṉi
k kiḻamaiyum pe
ṟṟa rohiṇi nāḷ
teṉṉāri nāṭṭu
dvitranadi Uttirati
rattu dakṣiṇacāśi
yil Uṭaiyār
viśvanādhaṉukku mu
ṉṉāḷ poṉṉiṉ
perumāḷ parāk
kiṟama pāṇṭiya te
var Iruntaruḷiya I
ṭam garbhagrahādima
hā gopurānatam
tiruppaṇiyum cey
vittu pradiṣṭādi Ut
savāntamum naṭatti
Iṉṉāyaṉārkku nitta
naimittaṅkaḷu
kku veṇṭun tevatā
ṉaṅkaḷum viṭṭup pa
la Iṟaikaḷilum pala
svatantraṅkaḷuṅ kaṟ
pittu Ivvakai ka
ḷukkuk kallum ve
ṭṭik kuṭuttu naṭan
tu potukiṟa Itu ra
kṣittuk koḷḷum
paṭi [ Aruntāma] ceṉa
ttaiyum maṟṟum A
ñcu vakaippaṭṭa
parikarttā
raiyuṅ kaṟpi
ttu Ivarka
ḷ taṅkaḷ A
ṭaiyāḷa mu
ṅkallum
veṭṭi nā
ṭṭik kuṭut
tu naṭantu
potu ki ra
vum Āma
poḻutu ce
ṉattiṉa pe
rāle Eṅka
ḷ kaṇakku
ccanti Āka O
ru canti pūcai
naṭakka ve
ṉum Eṉṟu
kaṟpittu nā
ḷitu mutalu
kku naṭakka
k kaṟpitta
pūcaikaḷu I
ṭṭapaṭit
tarattiṉ pa
ṭi nāḷ Oṉ
ṟukku Amu
tu paṭi pata
kkum Itu
kku veṇ
ṭuṅ kaṟi Amu
tu neyya
mutu caṟka
rai Amutu
paḻa Amutu
(u)ppamutu
miḷakamutu
cāttup
paṭi kuṅ
kumam pac
caik kaṟ
pūram paṉ
nir puḻuku
tiruccān
tu tirumā
lai tirup
parivaṭṭa
m tiruve(ṟ)
ṟṟāṭai Eṇṇaik
kāpput tiruviḷak
keṇṇai Ilai A
mutu Aṭaikkāya
mutu Amutu paṭikka
ṟpūram paṇamāṟi
Uṭpaṭa maṟṟum E
ppeṟpaṭṭa pala
vakaikaḷum paḻai
ya tevatāṉamāṉa
paṟṟil [acutta l ku]
ḷamum m
yum putukku
ḷamāka veṭṭuvittu
ppaṟṟum kāṭuveṭ
ṭit tiruttip payircce
yvittu mel vāraṅ
koṇṭu pūcai naṭak
kumpaṭiyuṅ kaṟpittu I
tukku veṇṭum paṇamu
ṅkuṭuttu Iṉṉāḷ muta
l candrādityavat cel
la naṭantu potum pa
ṭi perumāḷ kulaceka
rap perumāḷ tiruvā
calkaḷilc ceṉamum kuṟai
vāy mutta tiruvaṭi ti
ruvācalilc ceṉamu
m maṟṟuḷḷa tiruvāca
l kaḷiṟ ceṉamum I
nta tiruvācalkaḷi
l maṟṟum Añcuvakai
ppaṭṭa parikarttā
ruṅkūṭik kaṟpittu
kkallum veṭṭik
kuṭuttamaikku
Digital edition of SII 26.560 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
